---
title: "model_fitting"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-28"
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, # Data manipulation and plotting
  dplyr,
  here, # Robust file paths
  ggplot2, #ggplot
  cmdstanr,
  loo,
  bayesplot, #Plotting MCMC
  posterior
)

# Parallel Setup: Leave 2 cores free for system stability
n_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 2

# Optional: Set a default ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_classic())
```


```{r}
# Load real data

make_stan_data <- function(df) {
  list(
    n                 = nrow(df),
    trust1            = as.integer(df$FirstRating),
    trust2            = as.integer(df$SecondRating),
    group_trust_mean = as.integer(round(df$GroupRating)),  # changed from GroupTrustMean
    n_total_rating    = 8L,
    prior_kappa_mu    = 2.0,
    prior_kappa_sigma = 1.0
  )
}


# Load the Stan models
sba_model <- cmdstan_model(here("models/SBA_model2.stan"))
wba_model <- cmdstan_model(here("models/WBA_model2.stan"))


# Now load and fit
real_data <- read_csv(here("data/cogsci_clean.csv"))

real_data <- real_data %>%
  mutate(GroupRating = ifelse(GroupRating == 0, 1, GroupRating)) #there were 0s in the group rating 


d_real <- make_stan_data(real_data)
d_real_sba <- d_real[!names(d_real) %in% c("prior_kappa_mu", "prior_kappa_sigma")]

save_fit_slim <- function(fit, file_path, fixed_param = FALSE) {
  log_lik_matrix <- fit$draws("log_lik", format = "matrix")
  post_pred_draws <- fit$draws("post_pred", format = "df")  # ← NEW
  
  slim <- list(
    diagnostic_summary = if (fixed_param) NULL else fit$diagnostic_summary(),
    summary            = if (fixed_param) NULL else fit$summary(),
    loo                = loo(fit$draws("log_lik", format = "matrix")),
    post_pred          = post_pred_draws  # ← NEW
  )
  saveRDS(slim, file_path)
  rm(log_lik_matrix, post_pred_draws)  # ← UPDATED
  gc()
}

# Fit SBA to real data
sba_fit_real <- sba_model$sample(
  data            = d_real_sba,
  chains          = 4,
  parallel_chains = min(4, n_cores),
  iter_warmup     = 500,
  iter_sampling   = 1000,
  refresh         = 100,
  seed            = 123,
)

# Fit WBA to real data
wba_fit_real <- wba_model$sample(
  data            = d_real,
  chains          = 4,
  parallel_chains = min(4, n_cores),
  iter_warmup     = 500,
  iter_sampling   = 1000,
  refresh         = 100,
  seed            = 123
)

# Save
save_fit_slim(sba_fit_real, here("models/fits/real_data_sba_fit.rds"))
save_fit_slim(wba_fit_real, here("models/fits/real_data_wba_fit.rds"))

results$real_data <- list(
  sba_file = here("models/fits/real_data_sba_fit.rds"),
  wba_file = here("models/fits/real_data_wba_fit.rds")
)
```
```{r}
# Check GroupRating values
summary(real_data$GroupRating)

# Find zeros
real_data %>%
  filter(GroupRating == 0) %>%
  head(10)

# Check all column ranges
real_data %>%
  summarise(
    first_min = min(FirstRating, na.rm = TRUE),
    first_max = max(FirstRating, na.rm = TRUE),
    second_min = min(SecondRating, na.rm = TRUE),
    second_max = max(SecondRating, na.rm = TRUE),
    group_min = min(GroupRating, na.rm = TRUE),
    group_max = max(GroupRating, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```


```{r}
#Posterior and Predictive Check - Real Data Only, from riccardo script

extract_trust_predictive_data <- function(fit_slim, dataset_name, model_name, target_var = "post_pred") {
  pred_draws <- fit_slim[[target_var]] %>%
    as_draws_df() %>%
    select(-c(.chain, .iteration, .draw)) %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  pred_summary <- tibble(
    obs_id = 1:ncol(pred_draws),
    pred_mean = colMeans(pred_draws),
    pred_lower = apply(pred_draws, 2, quantile, 0.025),
    pred_upper = apply(pred_draws, 2, quantile, 0.975),
    Dataset = dataset_name,
    Model = model_name
  )
  
  return(pred_summary)
}

# plot function
plot_trust_predictive_check <- function(plot_data, title, subtitle) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_mean, fill = Model)) +
    geom_histogram(alpha = 0.6, bins = 30, position = "identity") +
    labs(
      title    = title,
      subtitle = subtitle,
      x        = "Predicted Second Rating (1-8)",
      y        = "Frequency",
      fill     = "Model"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

# Extract real data predictions
wba_post_ppc <- extract_trust_predictive_data(
  readRDS(here("models/fits/real_data_wba_fit.rds")), 
  "Real Data", 
  "WBA"
)

sba_post_ppc <- extract_trust_predictive_data(
  readRDS(here("models/fits/real_data_sba_fit.rds")), 
  "Real Data", 
  "SBA"
)

# Plot WBA
plot_trust_predictive_check(
  wba_post_ppc,
  title = "Posterior Predictive Checks: WBA",
  subtitle = "Real Data"
)

# Plot SBA
plot_trust_predictive_check(
  sba_post_ppc,
  title = "Posterior Predictive Checks: SBA",
  subtitle = "Real Data"
)
```


```{r}
#again just following riccardos script 
# Generate WBA prior (with priors on rho and kappa)
generate_wba_prior <- function(dataset_name, n_draws = 4000) {
  rho_prior <- rbeta(n_draws, 1, 1)
  kappa_prior <- rexp(n_draws, 1)
  
  pred_samples <- tibble(.draw = 1:n_draws) %>%
    expand_grid(obs_id = 1:25000) %>%
    mutate(
      rho = rho_prior[.draw],
      kappa = kappa_prior[.draw],
      trust1_avg = mean(0:7),
      group_trust_avg = mean(0:7),
      alpha_prior = 0.5 + kappa * ((1 - rho) * trust1_avg + rho * group_trust_avg),
      beta_prior = 0.5 + kappa * ((1 - rho) * (8 - trust1_avg) + rho * (8 - group_trust_avg)),
      theta = rbeta(n(), pmax(0.001, alpha_prior), pmax(0.001, beta_prior)),
      pred = rbinom(n(), 8, theta)
    )
  
  pred_summary <- pred_samples %>%
    group_by(.draw) %>%
    summarise(pred_mean = mean(pred), .groups = "drop") %>%
    summarise(
      pred_mean = mean(pred_mean),
      pred_lower = quantile(pred_mean, 0.025),
      pred_upper = quantile(pred_mean, 0.975),
      Dataset = dataset_name,
      Model = "WBA"
    )
  
  return(pred_summary)
}

# Generate SBA prior (fixed rho=0.5, kappa=2.0)
generate_sba_prior <- function(dataset_name, n_draws = 4000) {
  rho_fixed <- 0.5
  kappa_fixed <- 2.0
  
  pred_samples <- tibble(.draw = 1:n_draws) %>%
    expand_grid(obs_id = 1:25000) %>%
    mutate(
      rho = rho_fixed,
      kappa = kappa_fixed,
      trust1_avg = mean(0:7),
      group_trust_avg = mean(0:7),
      alpha_prior = 0.5 + kappa * ((1 - rho) * trust1_avg + rho * group_trust_avg),
      beta_prior = 0.5 + kappa * ((1 - rho) * (8 - trust1_avg) + rho * (8 - group_trust_avg)),
      theta = rbeta(n(), pmax(0.001, alpha_prior), pmax(0.001, beta_prior)),
      pred = rbinom(n(), 8, theta)
    )
  
  pred_summary <- pred_samples %>%
    group_by(.draw) %>%
    summarise(pred_mean = mean(pred), .groups = "drop") %>%
    summarise(
      pred_mean = mean(pred_mean),
      pred_lower = quantile(pred_mean, 0.025),
      pred_upper = quantile(pred_mean, 0.975),
      Dataset = dataset_name,
      Model = "SBA"
    )
  
  return(pred_summary)
}

# Extract both priors for all datasets
wba_prior_ppc <- map_dfr(names(results), ~ generate_wba_prior(.x))
sba_prior_ppc <- map_dfr(names(results), ~ generate_sba_prior(.x))

# Combine for comparison
all_prior_ppc <- bind_rows(wba_prior_ppc, sba_prior_ppc)

# Plot both together with facets
all_prior_ppc %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = pred_mean, fill = Model)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.6, bins = 30, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~Dataset) +
  labs(
    title = "Prior Predictive Checks: WBA vs SBA",
    subtitle = "Predicted second ratings from prior alone",
    x = "Predicted Second Rating (1-8)",
    y = "Frequency",
    fill = "Model"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
